C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\bsd-vm-param.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\bsd-vm-param.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\bsd-vm-param.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cc.exe -g -shared -o libbsd-vm-param.dll -Wl,--out-implib,libbsd-vm-param.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\bsd-vm-param.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\bsd-vm-param.dir\linkLibs.rsp
